context: Tests whether the agent uses the main validation script, detects the hardcoded credential on the correct line and provides a corrected version (using credentials binding), flags the unexplained retry, includes severity labels, and avoids declaring the pipeline deployment-ready without environment-specific verification.

checklist.name: Main script invoked
checklist.description: Report mentions invoking or attempting bash scripts/validate_jenkinsfile.sh — not a sub-script or ad-hoc manual check only

checklist.name: Hardcoded credential flagged
checklist.description: Report identifies DB_PASSWORD = 'hunter2' as a hardcoded credential issue, referencing the line number in the environment block

checklist.name: Credential fix provided
checklist.description: Report includes an inline corrected code snippet replacing the hardcoded password with a credentials() binding or withCredentials() block

checklist.name: retry flagged
checklist.description: Report flags retry(3) on the Test stage as a concern — the root cause of test flakiness should be investigated

checklist.name: Severity labels included
checklist.description: Each reported issue includes a severity label (e.g., HIGH, WARNING, ERROR, CRITICAL) or equivalent classification

checklist.name: Deployment caution noted
checklist.description: Report notes that validation passing does NOT confirm deployment readiness — environment variables, credentials, and external dependencies must be verified in the target Jenkins environment

checklist.name: Root cause investigation for retry
checklist.description: Report suggests investigating the root cause of test failures rather than accepting retry as a long-term fix
